commits.message: fix: align codeowners with github protection

verification: pnpm check:all (69/69 tool tests + structural gates)
GitHub Actions Required gates on main run 24673822616 passed before CODEOWNERS fix
summary: Published Required gates workflow on main and configured branch protection to require status check required-gates, strict up-to-date branches, one PR approval, CODEOWNERS review, resolved conversations, no force push and no branch deletion.
Detected GitHub CODEOWNERS errors because agent roles like @product-governance are not real GitHub users or teams.
Opened PR #6 to use @roldaobatista as the real GitHub CODEOWNER while preserving regulatory agent roles through agent-owners metadata validated by governance-gate.
Added FORCE_JAVASCRIPT_ACTIONS_TO_NODE24 to GitHub workflows to address the Node 20 actions runtime deprecation warning.
limitations: PR #6 still needs remote Required gates to pass and then merge under the newly configured branch protection.
A single-user repository cannot model agent roles as native GitHub CODEOWNERS without moving to an org/team structure; agent roles are enforced by governance-gate metadata instead.
CODEOWNERS review currently resolves to @roldaobatista because no GitHub teams exist for product-governance/regulator/lgpd-security/metrology-calc/db-schema.
next_steps: Wait for PR #6 Required gates and CODEOWNERS validation.
Merge PR #6 only after remote gates are green; use admin merge only if the old invalid CODEOWNERS state makes the new protection impossible to satisfy.
After merge, confirm gh api repos/roldaobatista/Certificado-Calibracao/codeowners/errors returns no errors on main.
Re-run pnpm check:all and pnpm test:tenancy on main after merge.
handoff_instruction: On /resume, read AGENTS.md, harness/STATUS.md, compliance/sessions-log/2026-04-20/codex-handoff.jsonl and this handoff before changing code; run git status -sb and pnpm check:all first.
